headline: How Cisco’s Secure AI Factory and Quantum Networking Bets Could Reshape the Cisco Systems (CSCO) Narrative
summary: In June 2026, Equinix announced an expanded collaboration with Cisco and NVIDIA to bring the Cisco Secure AI Factory into Equinix’s global data centers, while Cisco also joined Eurofiber, QBird and others as a founding partner of the Quantum Communication Fieldlab Rotterdam to advance quantum-secure networking in real-world infrastructure. Together, these initiatives highlight Cisco’s push to embed its networking and security technology at the heart of emerging AI and quantum-secure...
